title: AI Solution Developer
company_focus:
Integrated services and marketplace for real estate and
mortgage industries
description:
Company Description

Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. (NASDAQ: ASPS) is an
integrated service provider and marketplace for the real
estate and mortgage industries. Combining operational
excellence with a suite of innovative products and
technologies, Altisource helps solve the demands of the
ever-changing market. Additional information is available at
altisource.com.

Job Description

Core Skills

- Strong Python and/or Java development, including API
  integration and async workflows
- Practical experience with LLM APIs (Azure OpenAI, Bedrock,
  Anthropic, etc.)
- Ability to build conversational workflows, document-
  processing flows, and agent-style automations
- Comfortable with vector DBs, RAG patterns, prompt design,
  and prompt evaluation
- Basic ML concepts; ability to evaluate outputs, tune
  prompts, and implement QA feedback loops
- Experience with CI/CD and cloud services

Qualifications

Experience

- 2–5 years engineering experience, at least 1 year hands-on
  with LLMs
- Delivered working AI features or automations, ideally in
  enterprise process environments
- Experience using model APIs and orchestration frameworks
  (LangChain, Semantic Kernel, etc.)
- Hands-on building PDF/file extraction and validation flows
- Ability to move quickly in iterative sprints, respond to
  feedback, and debug LLM behavior

Additional Information

THE PERKS OF WORKING AT ALTISOURCE

Prosperity:

- Competitive base salaries!
- 401k plans with company matching – we want to empower you to
  further your career, and prepare for retirement!

Good Health:

- Comprehensive Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance plans
- Tax-free Flexible Spending Account
- Life insurance, short-term, and long-term disability

...And Happiness!

- Paid holidays, plus 19 days of accrued PTO for a total of 28
  paid days off per year!
- Free snacks, drinks and coffee!
- Plenty of employee engagement activities including sporting
  events, happy hours, and other fun team-building
  activities
- Opportunities to join our community service initiatives,
  including Habitat for Humanity
responsibilities: Build conversational workflows and document processing flows using LLM APIs
Implement agent-style automations and orchestration frameworks like LangChain and Semantic Kernel
Design, evaluate, and tune prompts with QA feedback loops
Work with vector databases and implement RAG patterns for AI solutions
Develop Python and/or Java applications with API integration and async workflows
Deploy AI features through CI/CD pipelines and cloud services
Build and validate PDF/file extraction flows
Debug LLM behavior and iterate quickly in sprints
use_cases: Conversational AI workflows for enterprise processes
Document processing and PDF extraction automation
RAG-powered enterprise search and information retrieval
AI-powered process automation in real estate and mortgage domains
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role requires hands-on experience building LLM-powered
applications including conversational workflows, document
processing flows, and agent-style automations. The developer
directly works with LLM APIs, orchestration frameworks
(LangChain, Semantic Kernel), RAG patterns, and prompt
engineering/tuning, which qualifies as working directly ON
AI systems.
